## Image description:
The image shows a driving scene from a front-facing vehicle camera.
## Rule:
- effective_red = red_light AND NOT green_light
- obstacle = car OR person OR rider OR other_obstacle
- clear = NOT obstacle
- stop = effective_red OR stop_sign OR obstacle
- forward = (green_light OR follow OR clear) AND NOT stop
- left = (left_lane OR left_green_light OR left_follow) AND NOT (no_left_lane OR left_obstacle OR left_solid_line)
- right = (right_lane OR right_green_light OR right_follow) AND NOT (no_right_lane OR right_obstacle OR right_solid_line)
